title: Brand Theme Colors & Member Join Flow
features: Church theme color system — set Primary, Secondary, and Accent colors in Church Settings to match your brand identity
Auto-extract colors from your uploaded church logo with a single click using canvas color analysis
Logo watermark — your church logo now appears as a subtle background watermark across all pages
Member sign-up flow — members can sign up independently and request to join a church by entering its URL slug
Admin approval for member join requests — church admins review and approve/reject new member requests from the Access Requests page
Clickable church name in sidebar links to Church Settings (super admin only)
Clickable admin name in sidebar links to User Profile page
fixes: Fixed infinite login loop when Clerk redirected to /login/tasks/choose-organization
Fixed registration page appearing as two separate screens — now a single combined page
Fixed settings save endpoint missing in the offline (desktop) version
Fixed profile link in desktop app sidebar causing a blank 'Page Not Found' screen
Fixed What's New update modal not appearing in the desktop (offline) version

title: Attendance Analytics & Access Requests
features: Attendance analytics page with visual trends and inactive member alerts
Access requests admin page with approve, reject, and revoke controls
Department color accent shown in sidebar for department-scoped roles
AI assistant improvements with finance and pastoral care context
fixes: Fixed token handling in Electron (offline) mode for access request approvals
Improved financial reports page with better chart rendering

title: Small Groups & Pastoral Care
features: Small groups management — create and manage Bible study, prayer, and outreach groups
Pastoral care module — log prayer requests, visitations, and counseling sessions privately
Volunteer tracking with event assignment, role, and check-in status
Announcements with audience targeting by department and priority
fixes: Fixed department head not seeing their assigned features
Fixed giving records not filtering by date range correctly

title: Departments & Role-Based Access
features: Department dashboards with custom feature sets per department
Role-based access control — super admin, pastor admin, finance officer, department head, data entry staff, member
Department heads can manage their own teams and events independently
Properties and assets inventory with condition and assignment tracking
fixes: Fixed member search not matching partial names
Fixed currency symbol not updating in reports after settings change

title: Initial Release
features: Member management with full profiles, milestones, photos, and membership status
Giving and tithe tracking with payment method categorization
Expenditure tracking with approval workflow
Attendance recording by event or service
Event calendar with department-aware scheduling
Sermon archive with audio/video links, scripture references, and tags
Financial reports — giving summaries, expense breakdowns, and trends
Desktop (offline) version for Windows — no internet required
Web version with real-time multi-user collaboration
Built-in AI assistant for pastoral insights and communications
